zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fitzwilliam於1460年出生在英國艾可頓 加農時，他的父親John Fitzwilliam45歲，母親Ellyn Vyllers40歲。他於大約1480年與Lady Anne Hawes在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1506年住在英國英格蘭。他於1523年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1534年8月9日在英國倫敦享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾馬霍爾姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fitzwilliam于1460年出生在英国艾可頓 加農时，他的父亲John Fitzwilliam45岁，母亲Ellyn Vyllers40岁。他于大约1480年与Lady Anne Hawes在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1506年住在英国英格兰。他于1523年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1534年8月9日在英国倫敦享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾馬霍爾姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzwilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Fitzwilliam was born in 1460, in Theydon Garnon, Essex, England, his father, John Fitzwilliam, was 45 and his mother, Ellyn Vyllers, was 40. He married Lady Anne Hawes about 1480, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in England, United Kingdom in 1506. In 1523, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 9 August 1534, in London, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Marholm, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.London, Greater Lond, England: St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fitzwilliam est né en 1460, à Theydon Garnon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Fitzwilliam, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Ellyn Vyllers, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Hawes environ 1480, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1506. En 1523, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 9 août 1534, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Marholm, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.London, Greater Lond, England: St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Fitzwilliam 1460 in Theydon Garnon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fitzwilliam 45 und seine Mutter Ellyn Vyllers 40. Er hat um 1480 in London, England Lady Anne Hawes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1506 hat er in England, United Kingdom gelebt. 1523 ist sein Beruf als sheriff in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. August 1534 im Alter von 74 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Marholm, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Fitzwilliam è nato il nel 1460 nel Theydon Garnon, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Fitzwilliam, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Ellyn Vyllers, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Hawes circa 1480, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1506. Nel 1523, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 9 agosto 1534, nel London, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Marholm, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Fitzwilliamが1460年にイギリスエセックススエイドン ガーノンで生まれた時，父John Fitzwilliamは45歳，母Ellyn Vyllersは40歳であった。約1480年にイギリスロンドンでLady Anne Hawesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年にはイギリスイギリスに住んでいた。1523年，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1534年8月9日にイギリスロンドンで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアマロールムにて埋葬された。

ko.London, Greater Lond, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창
ko.lifeSummary: William Fitzwilliam(이)가 1460년 영국 에세스 테이던 가넌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fitzwilliam(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellyn Vyllers(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1480년 영국 런던에서 Lady Anne Hawes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1506년도에 영국 잉글랜드에서 살았다. 1523년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1534년 8월 9일 영국 런던에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 마홀름에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Fitzwilliam nasceu em 1460, em Theydon Garnon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fitzwilliam, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Ellyn Vyllers, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Hawes aproximadamente 1480, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1506. Em 1523, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1534, em London, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Marholm, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.London, Greater Lond, England: ст бартоломю би т рояль эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fitzwilliam родился в 1460 г. в местности тидон гарнон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fitzwilliam было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellyn Vyllers, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Hawes около 1480 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности Англия, Великобритания в 1506 году. В 1523 году он работал по профессии sheriff в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 9 августа 1534 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности маролм, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Fitzwilliam nació en 1460, en Theydon Garnon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fitzwilliam, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Ellyn Vyllers, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Hawes aproximadamente 1480, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1506. En 1523, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1534, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Marholm, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
